definitions.text:
xem rúm
Ví dụ:
- chân tay dúm lại
(1) to gather with one’s fingers; pinch, handful; (2) wrinkled
[dúm] xem nhúm wrinkled, out of shape mặt anh ta dúm lại his face was contorted
battered out of shape

waddle
[dún dẩy] waddle
[dún vai] shrug one's shoulders
[dúm lại] assemble, amass, gather
